channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Voder - Wed Mar 18 09:17:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
Voder is an AI coding assistant for JetBrains IDEs. It brings multi-model chat, local context memory, and team-based agent workflows into the IDE so you can ask...

item.title: Qualimetry Terraform Analyzer - Thu Mar 19 06:51:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
